name: Weight Watcher Big Cookie #1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the non-fat dry milk and peanut butter.
2. Add raisins, sweetener, water, quick oats, cinnamon, and vanilla to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into one large cookie.
5. Place the cookie on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
EXCHANGE INFORMATION: Each Big Cookie contains 1 bread, 1 Milk, 1 Fruit, 1 Protein, 1 Fat.
